creator: robbertkl@renbeek.nl
text:
Trying to install yesterday's update to www/zend-framework1 won't install.

Lots of errors like this:

pkg-static: lstat(/usr/obj/usr/ports/www/zend-framework1/work/stage/usr/local/@comment share/examples/ZendFramework/tests/Zend/Config/): No such file or directory
pkg-static: lstat(/usr/obj/usr/ports/www/zend-framework1/work/stage/usr/local/@comment share/examples/ZendFramework/tests/Zend/CodeGenerator/Php/_files/): No such file or directory
pkg-static: lstat(/usr/obj/usr/ports/www/zend-framework1/work/stage/usr/local/@comment share/examples/ZendFramework/tests/Zend/CodeGenerator/Php/Property/): No such file or directory
pkg-static: lstat(/usr/obj/usr/ports/www/zend-framework1/work/stage/usr/local/@comment share/examples/ZendFramework/tests/Zend/CodeGenerator/Php/Docblock/Tag/): No such file or directory
pkg-static: lstat(/usr/obj/usr/ports/www/zend-framework1/work/stage/usr/local/@comment share/examples/ZendFramework/tests/Zend/CodeGenerator/Php/Docblock/): No such file or directory
pkg-static: lstat(/usr/obj/usr/ports/www/zend-framework1/work/stage/usr/local/@comment share/examples/ZendFramework/tests/Zend/CodeGenerator/Php/): No such file or directory
pkg-static: lstat(/usr/obj/usr/ports/www/zend-framework1/work/stage/usr/local/@comment share/examples/ZendFramework/tests/Zend/CodeGenerator/): No such file or directory

Fix: 

It seems this commit broke it:
http://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/www/zend-framework1/pkg-plist?r1=328618&r2=332912

I tried to submit a patch file, but it was > 100KB. The patch had a lot of changes like this:

-@dirrmtry %%PORTEXAMPLES%%%%EXAMPLESDIR%%/tests/resources/languages
+%%PORTEXAMPLES%%@dirrmtry %%EXAMPLESDIR%%/tests/resources/languages

Basically reverting the entire bottom changeblock from http://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/www/zend-framework1/pkg-plist?r1=328618&r2=332912
How-To-Repeat: Try to install www/zend-framework1 from (latest) ports tree.
